<p>Bhubaneswar/Baripada, Apr 14 (PTI): Over 100 students fell ill and one of them, a Class 5 student, died on Tuesday, two days after having a meal at a government-run tribal residential school in Odisha's Mayurbhanj district, following which Chief Minister Mohan Charan Mahi ordered a probe, officials said.</p><p>Officials said the students of the Kakabandha Ashram School complained of discomfort

### [UP: Tension in Kasganj, Agra and Lakhimpur Kheri on Ambedkar Jayanti](https://news.abplive.com/news/india/up-tension-in-kasganj-agra-and-lakhimpur-kheri-on-ambedkar-jayanti-1836504)
*ABP Live Hindi* - Apr 15, 00:45 IST

<p>Kasganj/Agra/Lakhimpur Kheri (UP), Apr 14 (PTI): Tension prevailed in Kasganj, Agra, Lakhimpur Kheri and Lucknow districts of Uttar Pradesh on Ambedkar Jayanti.</p><p> The situation became tense in Kasganj after a stone-pelting incident during a procession, while miscreants climbed Parshuram Chowk in Agra. ### [सीबीएसई की 10वीं कक्षा के परिणाम जल्द हो सकते हैं जारी, स्टूडेंट्स ऐसे देख पाएंगे रिज़ल्ट](https://www.bbc.com/hindi/articles/c2399m0gde4o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss)
*BBC Hindi* - Apr 14, 21:46 IST

बीते साल सीबीएसई ने 10वीं कक्षा के रिज़ल्ट 13 मई को घोषित किए थे. लेकिन मीडिया रिपोर्ट्स में दावा किया जा रहा है कि इस बार सीबीएसई एक महीना पहले ही 10वीं कक्षा के रिज़ल्ट घोषित कर सकता है. सीबीएसई की 10वीं कक्षा के परिणाम जल्द हो सकते हैं जारी, स्टूडेंट्स ऐसे देख पाएंगे रिज़ल्ट

### [Modi, Trump Hold 40-Minute Call On West Asia Tensions, Stress Security Of Strait Of Hormuz](https://news.abplive.com/news/india/pm-modi-donald-trump-phone-call-for-40-minutes-after-failed-us-iran-peace-talks-brokered-by-pakistan-1836481)

<p>Prime Minister Narendra Modi and US President Donald Trump held a nearly 40-minute phone conversation amid rising tensions in West Asia, following the collapse of recent US-Iran peace talks.</p> <p>The call, the third between the two leaders this year, comes at a critical moment as uncertainty grows over a fragile ceasefire in the region.
